name: Kaiser Aluminum Corporation
description: Kaiser Aluminum Corporation is a leading producer of highly engineered, semi-fabricated aluminum products for demanding applications. With a history spanning nearly a century, the company serves diverse end markets including aerospace and high-strength applications, packaging, general engineering, and automotive. Headquartered in Franklin, Tennessee, Kaiser Aluminum focuses on delivering innovative, sustainable, and high-quality aluminum solutions, emphasizing reliability, service, and technical expertise to meet the complex needs of its global customer base.
